parts.text: I want to return my product
how do I send something back?
I want to exchange this item
can I get my money back?
wrong item delivered, I want to return it

text: Our return policy allows returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be in original, unused condition. To start a return, visit support.example.com/returns.
You can return items within 30 days. Refunds are processed in 5–7 business days. Shall I help you initiate the process?
